title: Thai Peanut Salmon with Veg & Rice
description: Asian-inspired salmon with a rich peanut sauce, steamed vegetables, and brown rice.

description: High-protein Vietnamese-style chicken bowl with fragrant lemongrass, fresh vegetables, and brown rice.
